user.title: Set up TrueGuard MZ
user.description: Choose automatic discovery or enter the WebPanel address manually.

automatic.title: Find TrueGuard MZ
automatic.description: Home Assistant scans its selected local IPv4 networks for the WebPanel fingerprint. Submit to scan again.

credentials.title: Connect to discovered panel
credentials.description: Found {count} compatible panel(s). Enter the login for the panel WebPanel.

data_description.scan_interval: Choose 5-3600 seconds. Very short intervals create more traffic to the panel.

manual.title: Connect manually
manual.description: Enter a local hostname or address and the WebPanel login.

data_description.scan_interval: Choose 5-3600 seconds. Very short intervals create more traffic to the panel.

dhcp_confirm.title: TrueGuard MZ discovered
dhcp_confirm.description: A compatible panel was found at {host}. Enter its WebPanel login to add it.

data_description.scan_interval: Choose 5-3600 seconds. Very short intervals create more traffic to the panel.

reconfigure.title: Change panel address
reconfigure.description: Use this if the panel was moved and DHCP discovery did not update it automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to a compatible TrueGuard MZ panel
error.invalid_auth: The panel rejected the username or password
error.no_devices_found: No compatible WebPanel was found. Check the network selection or use manual setup.

abort.not_trueguard: The discovered Climax device is not a compatible TrueGuard MZ WebPanel

init.title: TrueGuard MZ polling
init.description: Changes are applied immediately by reloading the integration.

data_description.scan_interval: Choose 5-3600 seconds. The panel receives two parallel page requests per poll.
